description: Orphan-edge completion. Card carried `characters: [dsk-toy-horror]` frontmatter pointer + the node's `appears_on:` already listed the card + the node body already had a substantive Ragged-Playmate paragraph (line 47) — but the card body had no `## Connections` back-edge, so the mirror was one-sided. Wrote the back-edge bullet drawing language from the node's own *ragdoll-revenant / abandonment-survivor* framing, the flavor-text Henry quote, and the five-archetype substrate roster. Worst orphan-edge ever was the 504-card pile this came from. This is one. Five hundred and three to go. The triage entry estimated 87; actual sweep finds 504. Worth surfacing.
citations: [Scryfall: type_line "Artifact Creature — Toy", flavor_text on DSK-150]
[MTG Wiki: Duskmourn House of Horror — Toy subtype]
[Mark Rosewater: Top of the Duskmourning Pt 1/2 — cursed-toy register]
other_candidates_considered: 104-killer-s-mask -> symbols/manifest-dread (also git-modified, also orphan back-edge); deferred — could be picked next invocation
109-miasma-demon, 114-popular-egotist, 117-sporogenic-infection, 167-anthropede — git-modified DSK cards, but none carry layer-node frontmatter pointers yet, so no orphan-edge to complete
503 other corpus-wide one-sided cohort edges per the wave-191 sweep count
next_pass_suggestions: Triage entry line 81 needs UPDATE: 'estimated ~87, actual sweep 2026-05-24 finds 504' — the discrepancy is large enough that the 'mechanized sweep wave' recommendation now reads as urgent rather than optional. A scripted sweep that auto-writes the card-side `## Connections` bullet using each node body's matching paragraph would burn down 504 cards in one pass; per-Edgelord-wave rate would take ~500 invocations.

Sibling completion targets in same cohort: 20-living-phone, 195-patchwork-beastie, 24-patched-plaything, 242-attack-in-the-box — all four sibling Toys carry `characters: [dsk-toy-horror]` and likely lack `## Connections`. A `dsk-toy-horror`-scoped batch (5 mirror completions in one shot) would close the cohort cleanly and serve as a tight pilot for the sweep-wave template.
104-killer-s-mask -> symbols/manifest-dread is the orthogonal one this wave touched (vision/trivia git-mod) — would resolve a symbol-layer back-edge rather than character-layer.
